name: Caramel Nut Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into creamed mixture.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Shape dough into 1 1/4-inch (3 cm) balls. Dip tops in chopped pecans. Place cookies 2 inches (5 cm) apart on ungreased baking sheet. Press half a caramel in center of each cookie.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 7 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are set. Do not overbake. Cool cookies 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies
